sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 43:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 43:1
items.html: In ZON of Keter of AB of AK, the first coupling is nearly on the level of Keter, and the second coupling is in the level of Hochma. However, ZON of Keter of SAG, the first coupling is nearly in the level of Hochma, and the second coupling is in the level of Bina.
